programme.desc: A calculating Sherlock Holmesian character traps Picard and others in a holodeck simulation.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi is enamored with a beautiful and mysterious Starfleet lieutenant accused of murder.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Forced to impersonate a Romulan Intelligence official, Counselor Troi becomes a pivotal part of an elaborate defection scheme.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Picard loses his life in a surprise attack, Q gives him the chance to change his destiny.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worf and Data embark on unusual journeys to seek out their fathers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In seeking his father, Worf discovers a prisoner-of-war camp that has evolved into a Klingon/Romulan haven - an Eden where Worf becomes their serpent.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While the Enterprise is bombarded with lethal rays, Picard is trapped on board with a band of interstellar thieves.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard is torn between love and duty when he is forced to send the woman he loves on a potentially deadly mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard finds himself in a race with Cardassians, Klingons, and Romulans to solve a four billion-year-old genetic puzzle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Trapped in an alien mental hospital, with little memory of the past, Riker is convinced he is going insane.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A pioneering Ferengi scientist Is found dead, and Beverly risks her career to prove he was murdered.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tom's latest shuttle acquisition blurs the line between man and machine.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew discovers a new side of Tuvok when an enemy attack leaves him stripped of his Vulcan sensibilities.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Mysterious corridors in space lead to the discovery of an ancient civilization.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A subspace anomaly leads to the discovery of a 21st century space shuttle lost on a mission to Mars.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven uncovers a conspiracy to keep Voyager stranded in the Delta Quadrant.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Barclay uses holograms to formulate a plan to open communications with Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway's holographic love interest becomes more than just a way to pass the time.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager becomes the unwitting focus of a planet's entire civilization.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor's passion for music spills over into his personal life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew is haunted by vivid images of a battle they don't remember fighting.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Killing for sport becomes Seven's only means of survival when she is abducted into a ring of fisticuffs.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven becomes a mentor to five young drones abandoned by the Collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew makes first contact with a holodeck program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Claiming to be a long-dead crewmember, an alien requests asylum on Voyager.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the SG-1 team reports in from a brutal mission, they discover that their fifth team member -- Lt. Tyler -- may not actually have been real. Does this mean the end of the Stargate Program? If the Pentagon's Col. Simmons has his way, it will.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team is welcomed on K'Tau by the planet's religious leader, who takes the reddening sky concurrent with their arrival as a sign from their gods. What he doesn't know is that the reddish color is signaling the planet's impending doom!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the eve of her birthday, Cassandra is showing signs of mind fire, a powerful electromagnetic field triggered at puberty. Now SG-1 must find a cure to stop the life-threatening changes before she destroys herself…and the command center!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel's Unas friend, Chaka (Dion Johnstone), is captured by a pre-industrial civilization that uses Unas as slaves. While attempting to free Chaka from this cruel regime, Daniel risks the safety of SG-1, and possibly the life of his friend.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a rescue mission to recover Russian soldiers believed missing in action on a previously undisclosed trip, the SG-1 team gets trapped in a Goa'uld tomb with a number of decomposed bodies…and a deadly alien monster with an appetite for human flesh!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns to Tollana for the funeral of Chancellor Omoc, only to discover the rulers have reversed their policy on technology sharing and will now trade advanced weaponry with Earth. But is there a secret agenda behind the gesture?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 discover an opportunity to form an alliance with an advanced race who are willing to share their technology. They are the Aschen, the danger of whom the future SG-1 team warned about. Will the truth be revealed before it is too late?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Major Carter is abducted by a reclusive billionaire with nefarious plans that threaten her life, O'Neill and the rest of the SG-1 team must work with an old adversary to solve the mystery of her disappearance and bring her back alive!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A ship headed for Earth is linked to the pod found through the alien Martin. Investigating what he knows, SG-1 finds Martin has become a consultant on a sci-fi series called Wormhole X-treme!, with a plot uncannily like the Stargate program!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Col. Jack O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and his new SG recruits have become the targets of a secret hostile takeover. Now it's up to a wounded O'Neill and his neophyte troop to save the command center from a possible alien invasion!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a pursuit by the Goa'uld gliders, Teal'c fails to make it through the Stargate before it is destroyed. Now SG-1 has only 48 hours to reestablish Teal'c's energy signature from the temporary memory of the Stargate before it's erased…for good!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A truce is declared among the Goa'uld, so that the warlords can attend a summit on the future of universe domination. As Jackson speaks fluent Goa'uld, he is sent to the summit disguised as an aide. But his real mission is to poison the delegates!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission, Ronon (Jason Momoa) is ambushed and captured by his former friend, Tyre (Mark Dacascos), and turned over to the Wraith. As the team scrambles for leads to locate their friend, Ronon undergoes a torturous ordeal.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A drive malfunction aboard a mysterious duplicate Daedalus sends the team jumping through various alternate realities where they encounter sinister alien life forms, a searing sun, and a pitched space battle over Atlantis.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry entices Huckleberry to come for a visit by asking him to team up and write a mystery story for an online mystery magazine.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry’s Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by the online mystery magazine, Strawberry comes up with a new way to raise funds for Huckleberry’s pet shelter—a big dog show!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum’s plan to direct a small, simple fairy tale play as a surprise performance for the Baby Berrykins snowballs out of control when she hears of the same play being done on a grand scale in a big city theater.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Drafted by the girls to play Prince Berry Charming in a community play, Huck pushes aside his reluctance and tries to not disappoint them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry and Huckleberry pitch their new play, an adaptation of the Berrykin Kids’ favorite BerryFairyTale 'The Littlest Berrykin' to their friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: A problem in the sparkleberry juice system that powers the entire town results in a repair crew of Berrykins invading the town with jackhammers.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Tomás entrega su renuncia, pero antes, como jefe de los mineros, despide a Gabriela para evitar que muera en otro derrumbe. Ella vuelve a la mina y le pide su trabajo de vuelta a Alejandro. Él acepta, sin poder disimular lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: Pasion de Gavilanes (LAS)

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger revives a damaged lawn. Tom and Kevin build a simple utility cart out of plywood. Richard Trethewey helps a homeowner fix a clogged kitchen sink drain.

programme.desc: Roger shows how to attract various bird species. Tom shares various types of interior moldings and their uses, the guys ask "What is it?" and Richard conserves water with a "dual-flush" toilet valve.

programme.desc: Tom repairs a staircase’s wobbly newel post. Richard shows Kevin several methods for cutting rigid pipes and flexible tubing. Roger Cook shows how to reproduce plants from cuttings and by grafting.

programme.desc: Richard replaces a leaky outdoor faucet. Roger shows Kevin how to sharpen a lawn mower blade properly. The guys ask: "What is it?" and Tom and Kevin build custom shelving for a walk-in closet.

programme.desc: Tom helps repair a rotted windowsill. The guys ask: "What is it?" and Roger shows Kevin gardening tools designed for people with limited mobility. Richard helps a homeowner install an outdoor faucet.

programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 1
programme.desc: On February 18th, 1995 Montell Griffin faced James Toney for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the IBF Inter-continental Light Heavyweight title with the bout ending with a majority decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Montell Griffin vs James Toney 2
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1996 Montell Griffin and James Toney fought for a second time at the Lawlor Events Center in Reno for World Light Heavyweight titles resulting in an unanimous decision win for Griffin.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Ernie Terrell
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1967 Muhammad Ali fought Ernie Terrel at the Astrodome in Hourston, Tx. They fought for WBA and WBC World Heavyweight titles in a bout that went 15 rounds ending in a unanimous decision victory for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Joe Frazier 3
programme.desc: On October 1st, 1975, Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier fought for the third time for the World Heavyweight Title. Known as the "Thrilla in Manila," Ali ultimately emerged as the victor in what is considered one of the greatest boxing matches of all time.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Mac Foster
programme.desc: On April 1st, 1972 Muhammad Ali and Mac Foster fought in a fifteen round bout that ended in a unanimous decision win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Oscar Natalio Bonavena
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1970 Muhammad Ali faced Oscar Natalio Bonavena in a 15 round bout with Bonavena going down three times in the last round forcing an automatic stoggage giving the win to Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Ken Norton 2
programme.desc: On September 10th, 1973 Muhammad Ali and Ken Norton participated in their second meeting at the Forum in Inglewood, CA. They fought for the North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight title with Ali winning this time with split decision.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Jason Moloney
programme.desc: On October 31st, 2020 Naoya Inoue faced Jason Moloney in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the IBF and WBA World Super Bantamweight titles ending in a knockout in the 7th round by Inoue.

programme.title: Naoya Inoue vs Nonito Donaire II
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2022 Naoya Inoue battled Nonoito Donaire for a second time at the Super Arena in Saitama for IBF, WBA and WBC World Bantamweight title with Inoue ending the bout in the second round defeating Donaire.

programme.title: Nonito Donaire vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On December 15th, 2012 Nonito Donaire faced Jorge Arce at the Toyota Center in Houston, Tx. With the bout ending in the third round with a win by Donaire, Arce announced his retirement in the ring after the bout.

programme.title: Orlando Salido vs Juan Manuel Lopez 2
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2012, Orlando Salido fought Juan Manuel Lopez for the WBO World Featherweight Title in San Juan, Puerto Rico. In a very entertaining fight with both fighters scoring knockdowns, Salido stopped Lopez in the 10th round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Curtis Strong
programme.desc: On February 6th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Curtis Strong fought at the Sports Arena in San Diego, Ca. in a 6 round bout that lasted 4 rounds ending in a technical knockout victory for De La Hoya.

programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. Megatron creates a powerful strike team, but his Stunticons lack sentience and independent thought. This leads the Decepticons deep into the heart of Cybertron to steal Vector Sigma, the computer that brought life to those on the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots celebrate their victory in the great war, they are attacked by mysterious, evil beings. Who are the attackers, and what do they want?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After determining that the Decepticons are not responsible for the recent treachery, the Autobots want to find out who is,

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Rodimus Prime seeks the true nature of the Quintessons and comes to a terrifying realization. But it might be too late, for the Decepticons are attacking Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Great battles rage. Blurr and Wheelie must complete a desperate mission, or Earth will be lost. Likewise, the Autobots must stop the fierce Decepticons, or Cybertron will fall into the hands of the Quintessons forever.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Great battles rage. Blurr and Wheelie must complete a desperate mission, or Earth will be lost. Likewise, the Autobots must stop the fierce Decepticons, or Cybertron will fall into the hands of the Quintessons forever.
